headline: West (WST) Stock Looks Pricey With Little Room Above Fair Value
summary: West Pharmaceutical Services stock has delivered a 64.7% return over the past year, yet the valuation checks and current pricing suggest it may no longer be an obvious bargain, with the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) estimate pointing to a level that is roughly in line with where the shares trade today. After such a strong run, investors are weighing solid business developments against signals that the stock screens as expensive on several measures. Over the past 1 year, West Pharmaceutical...
